name: iLabs nRF52 Device Management
description: Device management for nRF52 devices with external QSPI flash: LTE/HTTPS firmware-over-the-air updates plus transport-agnostic log upload. FOTA downloads a gzip-compressed firmware slot image over a caller-supplied HTTPS transport, stream-stages it into a QSPI download partition, verifies SHA-256 against the slot header, and arms the Adafruit-fork bootloader settings block. An update-check polls a small static JSON manifest and decides whether a newer image is offered for the device. The log uploader compresses and POSTs accumulated log bytes in resumable chunks. Modem-agnostic: transport and system couplings are injected.
keywords: devmgmt, fota, firmware, ota, update, nrf52, lte, qspi, logs, telemetry
